requirement_topic.en: 50 Hz Grid Frequency and Voltage Configuration for BESS in Bahrain
requirement_topic.zh: 巴林BESS的50Hz电网频率与电压配置
requirement_topic.zht: 巴林BESS的50Hz電網頻率與電壓配置

summary.en: Bahrain's grid operates at 50 Hz / 400 V (three-phase, four-wire) / 230 V (single-phase). BESS power conversion systems (PCS) and bidirectional inverters must be configured for 50 Hz and comply with EWA voltage tolerances: normal operating voltage at point of connection must not vary by more than ±6% from rated voltage; connection and disconnection must not cause voltage variation exceeding 3% at point of connection. Anti-islanding and protection settings must be configured to EWA grid-code requirements. BESS PCS pre-configured for China's 380 V / 220 V nominal grid require re-configuration and re-verification before EWA grid connection.
summary.zh: 巴林电网采用50Hz / 400V（三相四线制）/ 230V（单相）。BESS电力变换系统（PCS）和双向逆变器必须针对50Hz进行配置，并符合EWA电压容差：正常运行下并网点电压偏离额定电压不得超过±6%；并网或解列不得导致并网点电压变化超过3%。防孤岛和保护整定必须按EWA电网规程要求配置。针对中国380V / 220V额定电网预配置的BESS PCS，在EWA并网前需重新配置和核验。
summary.zht: 巴林電網採用50Hz / 400V（三相四線制）/ 230V（單相）。BESS電力變換系統（PCS）和雙向逆變器必須針對50Hz進行配置，並符合EWA電壓容差：正常運行下併網點電壓偏離額定電壓不得超過±6%；併網或解列不得導致併網點電壓變化超過3%。防孤島和保護整定必須按EWA電網規程要求配置。針對中國380V / 220V額定電網預配置的BESS PCS，在EWA併網前需重新配置和核驗。

standards_or_laws: EWA grid technical requirements (voltage and frequency tolerances for distributed generation and storage)
IEC 62933-2-1 (Electrical energy storage systems — Unit parameters and testing methods for energy measurement)

summary.en: China operates at 50 Hz, so grid frequency is not a gap. However, China's nominal LV system is 380 V (three-phase) / 220 V (single-phase), versus Bahrain's 400 V / 230 V. PCS voltage set-points, protection relay thresholds, and reactive power / power factor settings must be re-verified against EWA requirements before commissioning in Bahrain.
summary.zh: 中国采用50Hz，电网频率本身不存在差距。但中国低压额定系统为380V（三相）/ 220V（单相），而巴林为400V / 230V。PCS电压设定点、保护继电器阈值和无功功率/功率因数整定必须在巴林调试前根据EWA要求重新核验。
summary.zht: 中國採用50Hz，電網頻率本身不存在差距。但中國低壓額定系統為380V（三相）/ 220V（單相），而巴林為400V / 230V。PCS電壓設定點、保護繼電器閾值和無功功率／功率因數整定必須在巴林調試前根據EWA要求重新核驗。

gap.en: Verify PCS firmware and hardware covers 400 V (three-phase) / 230 V (single-phase) nominal. Adjust all protection trip thresholds, reactive power compensation, and anti-islanding settings to EWA tolerances. Record all settings in commissioning documentation reviewed by an EWA-approved engineer.
gap.zh: 核验PCS固件和硬件是否覆盖400V（三相）/ 230V（单相）额定值。根据EWA容差调整所有保护跳闸阈值、无功补偿和防孤岛整定。在EWA认可工程师审查的调试文件中记录所有整定值。
gap.zht: 核驗PCS固件和硬件是否覆蓋400V（三相）/ 230V（單相）額定值。根據EWA容差調整所有保護跳閘閾值、無功補償和防孤島整定。在EWA認可工程師審查的調試文件中記錄所有整定值。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for BESS connected to EWA's grid; voltage and protection settings must comply with EWA technical requirements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China domestic BESS grid connection; specific thresholds differ from Bahrain EWA requirements

source.publisher: Electricity and Water Authority (EWA), Kingdom of Bahrain

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Bahrain's grid is 50 Hz / 400 V / 230 V. BESS PCS pre-set for China's 380 V / 220 V requires voltage-range verification and protection-threshold re-configuration before EWA grid connection. Document commissioning settings for EWA-approved engineer sign-off.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴林电网为50Hz / 400V / 230V。针对中国380V / 220V预设的BESS PCS在EWA并网前需核验电压范围并重新配置保护阈值。记录调试整定值供EWA认可工程师签认。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴林電網為50Hz / 400V / 230V。針對中國380V / 220V預設的BESS PCS在EWA併網前需核驗電壓範圍並重新配置保護閾值。記錄調試整定值供EWA認可工程師簽認。
